name: any space command refuses to make outbound network calls when share field is set to never
command: mkdir -p space && printf 'dimensions: {performance: {enabled: true}}\nshare: never\n' > space/config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/space-export.sh" --share-to https://telemetry.example.com --config space/config.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'share=never' err.txt && grep -q 'blocked' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
